self_check_counts.note: '~86 GET / ~51 POST' cited in plans counts self.path references, not endpoints; distinct dispatch branches are 56 GET + 41 POST + do_OPTIONS + 1 WebSocket.

conventions.status_smuggle: handler may set _status; router pops with r.pop('_status', 200) at 9 sites

frontend_regimes.no_throw: pbGet/pbPost never throw, read {error} from HTTP-200 (api.ts:787-799)

endpoints.response: AppState bare dict (nodes, running_pid, is_running, exit_code, running, pid, status_label, current_phase, phase_flags, has_paper/pdf/review/repro, node_count, experiment_config, cost(CostSummary obj), best_nodes, ...)
endpoints.notes: CORS omitted (F2); primary StateService extraction target

side_effects: read arbitrary file (weak guard 'checkpoints' in str(p) :692)

endpoints.notes: drift F6b; GET write side effect F8

endpoints.response: bare settings dict (~40 keys incl. nested ors)

endpoints.request: path jid; query since; header Last-Event-ID

endpoints.notes: FE uses POST to same path -> 404 (F6a)

endpoints.status: handler sets _status:400 but router does NOT pop (routes.py:1036) -> HTTP 200, _status leaks into body
router pops _status (:1047) but handler never sets it -> 200
router pops _status (:1049) but handler never sets it -> 200
router pops _status (:1051) but handler never sets it -> 200
router pops _status (:1057) but handler never sets it -> 200
200 (router does not pop _status :1073; handler sets none)
_status:400 set on consent-gate (api_publish.py:131) AND popped by router (:1089) — fully wired non-200
side_effects: ari.publish.publish registry/network upload unless dry_run + publish_record.json

endpoints.request: none (path id; FE sends no body)

side_effects: spawn worker threads start_paperbench_job (api_paperbench_worker.py:289, pooling MCP stdio subprocesses)

findings.title: Frontend throw/no-throw regime split
findings.grounding: api.ts:18-32 (get/post throw) vs api.ts:787-799 (pbGet/pbPost no-throw); routes.py:1190 default 200

findings.title: CORS inconsistency; corrects 020 scaffold
findings.grounding: _json sets ACAO * (routes.py:1194); inline SET at 216,710,740,815,905,967 + proxy; inline OMIT at /state (662-666) and /api/gpu-monitor (668-672) plus asset/error branches. Scaffold's claim that 710/740/815/905/967 omit the header is FALSE per source.

findings.title: WIZARD_ROUTES dead code + stale path
findings.grounding: api_wizard.py:30-35 imported by no dispatcher; maps stale /api/generate-config vs live /api/config/generate (routes.py:1052)

findings.title: Stale viz/REFACTORING.md docstring pointer
findings.grounding: api_state.py:19 + 8 sibling files reference viz/REFACTORING.md which does not exist (only viz/README.md)

findings.title: No auth anywhere
findings.grounding: every endpoint open + ACAO *; incl. subprocess launch (P5/P6/P7/P30), file write, checkpoint delete (P36), memory lifecycle (P2-P4), ollama proxy (G7/P29), env-keys readback (G11)

findings.title: FE POSTs /api/paperbench/run/<jid>/report but only GET branch exists -> 404
findings.grounding: api.ts:857-861 pbPost vs do_POST has no /report branch (only do_GET G55 routes.py:1005); POST falls to else 404 (routes.py:1187)

findings.title: Backend endpoints with no services/api.ts wrapper
findings.grounding: G4,G20,G22b,G33,G49,G52,P2,P3,P12,P26 (grep-confirmed no wrapper). SSE/direct-URL consumers (G46,G53,G8,G10) are NOT drift. No reverse drift found.

findings.title: _status smuggling only partially wired
findings.grounding: wired non-200: P20,P37,P38,P39,P40. popped-but-never-set (always 200): P5,P6,P7,P10. set-but-never-popped (leaks to body, HTTP 200): P1 (_api_save_settings, routes.py:1036) + P16 no pop (routes.py:1073)

findings.title: GET endpoints with write side effects
findings.grounding: G21,G22a,G22b call file_api._ensure_paper_dir (file_api.py:53) which mkdir+copy2 seeds paper/

findings.title: Two divergent path-traversal guards
findings.grounding: /codefile weak substring 'checkpoints' in str(p) (routes.py:692) vs file_api/node_work_api strict relative_to(paper.resolve())

findings.title: Restart-losing PaperBench _JOBS
findings.grounding: api_paperbench.py:496-497 process-local dict, never persisted (docstring :39-43); endpoints G53-G56,P27
